query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.totalSales, s.totalPoints, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as realApprovedSales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id) as totalSalesInTable
FROM sellers s ORDER BY s.name;
command:

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id) as totalSalesInTable
